name: @midnight-experiments/xcontract-events-integration-tests
description: End-to-end proof for the xcontract-events experiment on a live local stack: deploys token + vault, drives the cross-contract call, and reads the MIP-0002 event back off the indexer with an authenticated-ledger validity proof. Gated by RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS; run `yarn compile:zk` in the contract package first.
